description_long: This hamburger features a smooth, golden-brown plain bun with no visible sesame seeds. The top bun is slightly domed and covers a layer of crispy bacon strips that extend outward from the sides. Beneath the bacon, a slice of melted yellow cheese is visible, partially draped over a round, white egg patty. The bottom bun is slightly flatter and supports the fillings, with the cheese and egg forming a distinct layer. The overall appearance is clean and appetizing, with the bacon and cheese providing contrasting colors and textures against the soft bun.
description: A golden-brown plain bun sandwiching bacon strips, melted cheese, and a round egg patty, with no sesame seeds visible.
description_view_0: The top bun dominates the view, with bacon strips and a hint of cheese and egg peeking out from the sides.
description_view_1: Bacon strips and the white egg patty are clearly visible, with the cheese layer partially exposed beneath the bacon.
description_view_2: The bacon and cheese are prominent, with the egg patty visible and the bun slightly lifted to reveal the layers.
description_view_3: The top bun is most prominent, with bacon strips extending from both sides and only slight hints of the cheese and egg visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Bacon strips are layered above a slice of melted cheese and a round egg patty, with the bacon extending outward and the cheese and egg forming a distinct middle layer.
